caseInfo.description: UiPath case record object. Supports fields such as MyBNumber, ApplicantEmail, AssignedWorker, CurrentStatus, CurrentStage, Priority, FilingDate, CreateTime, UpdateTime, Id, FolderID, MaestroProcessID, and file path fields.
Normalized caseInfo record returned with the worker decision.

decision.description: Worker selected decision or submitted action.

workerNotes.description: Optional notes entered by the worker.
